course_title: DIMENSIONS OF LATIN@ MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES
description: Provides training for students who aspire to one of the helping, health, or mental health professions and who currently work or who envision themselves working with Latin@ populations. Provides important frameworks for working with Latin@s, including cultural, spiritual, linguistic and historical features relevant to this population and begin to apply their knowledge in service learning placements.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Junior standing or 6 credits of CHICLA

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Junior standing or 6 credits of CHICLA
